sipantichijk@penguin:~$ # Broader BRAM check — find ANY EFX_RAM10 with a non-zero INIT_0
grep -m 5 "INIT_0.*[^0]0*[1-9]" ~/church_project/SoC/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v 2>/dev/null | head -5

# Also check if synthesis saw the ram_symbol0 assignments
grep -i "ram_symbol\|INIT\|bram\|ROM\|EFX_RAM" \
  ~/church_project/SoC/work_syn/synthesis.log 2>/dev/null | head -10

# Show the exact EFX_RAM10 instance name in map.v (for BRAM sym0)
grep -m 3 "EFX_RAM10" ~/church_project/SoC/outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v 2>/dev/null | head -3
